channel.description: Latest marine jobs for Engine Officers
channel.title: Maritime Union - Job for Mariners

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A 3rd Engineer is sought for an Oil/Chemical Tanker, with a joining date in June 2026. The contract duration is 2 months on/off, and the monthly salary is 3800 EUR. Candidates must possess an EU passport or Schengen visa. Further details are available at the office.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 3rd Engineer Job - Oil/Chemical Tanker at Stan Shipping Agency Ltd

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A 4th Engineer is sought for an oil tanker vessel. The position offers a contract duration of 2-4 months on/off, with a monthly salary of 3440 EUR. Joining is scheduled for June 2026. Applicants must possess an EU passport or Schengen visa. Further details are available upon request.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 4th Engineer Job - Oil Tanker at Stan Shipping Agency Ltd

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A 2nd Engineer is sought for an oil tanker vessel. The position offers a contract duration of 2 months on/off and a monthly salary of 6,600 EUR. Joining is scheduled for June 2026. Candidates must possess an EU passport or Schengen visa. Further details are available upon request.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 2nd Engineer Job - Oil Tanker 6,600 EUR at Stan Shipping Agency Ltd

item.description:
Location: China
Description:

Multiple positions are available for an LNG FSU conversion project in a Chinese shipyard. Openings include Fitter, Motorman, Pumpman, Electrician, and 4th Engineer. Joining dates vary from ASAP to mid-July, with some crew signing off around August 8th. Contracts range from 4 to 6 months. Salaries are competitive, with the Electrician role offering up to 7500 USD/month based on experience. The 4th Engineer position requires at least one contract on a steam vessel. Candidates from the EU, Malaysia, and Indonesia are considered. Further opportunities are expected in October.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Engineers and Ratings for LNG FSU Project 7500 USD at LAPA LTD

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Chief Engineer is sought for a VLEC gas carrier, operating with a MAN 6G60ME-C9-GIE main engine. Previous experience on LPG/LNG type vessels and dual-fuel engines is mandatory. Embarkation is scheduled for the first half of June. Competitive remuneration is offered for this role on state-of-the-art vessels.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Chief Engineer Job - VLEC Gas Carrier at Uniteam Marine

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Gas Engineer is sought for VLGC gas carriers. Previous experience in the rank on LPG vessels is required. Embarkation is scheduled for June. These high-tech vessels are powered by dual-fuel, electronically controlled engines, setting new standards in efficiency and sustainability.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Gas Engineer Job on VLGC Vessel at Uniteam Marine

item.description:
Location:
Description:

A Third Engineer position is available on advanced LNG carriers featuring dual-fuel, diesel-electric propulsion. Previous experience in this rank on LNG vessels is essential. Embarkation is scheduled for June and July. Attractive employment conditions are offered by a reputable owner in the LNG market.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 3rd Engineer Job - LNG Carrier at Uniteam Marine

item.description:
Location: Norway
Description:

A 3rd Engineer is needed for short-term cover on a DSV vessel in Norway. Joining on July 15th, the contract is for 1-2 weeks with a possibility of extension up to 4 weeks. Previous experience on DSV vessels and the ability to travel at short notice are mandatory. Required certifications include CoC, STCW Basic Safety, STCW Security, STCW PSCRB, STCW Medical First Aid, ERM, BOSIET or FOET, MLC Medical, and a Seaman's Book.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 3rd Engineer Job on DSV - Norway at etpm Ltd

item.description:
Location: Qatar
Description:

A 3rd Engineer is sought for a DP2 subsea support vessel. The position requires 12 months of documented sailing experience on CSV/DSV/MPSV and an OOPITO-approved BOSIET with CA-EBS. Joining is scheduled for August 12, 2026, for a contract duration of 8 weeks +/-2, operating in Qatar.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 3rd Engineer Job - Subsea Support Vessel DP2 at Atlas NextWave

item.description:
Location: Antarctica and the Arctic
Description:

A 4th Engineer is sought for a cruise vessel, responsible for maintenance and repairs of onboard technical installations. The role requires at least several voyages of experience as a marine engineer, a valid Officer in Charge of an Engineering Watch (STCW III/1) Certificate of Competency, and valid STCW certificates. A hands-on attitude, strong technical skills, and good English communication are essential. The position offers competitive compensation, a rotation of 10 weeks on/10 weeks off, and exceptional sailing destinations.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] 4th Engineer Job on Cruise Vessel at CSC Crewing BV
